project: Distributed Multi-Sensor System For Human Safety and Health (DistriMuSe)
title: Distributed Multi-Sensor System For Human Safety and Health (DistriMuSe)

keywords.label: Keywords
keywords.text: Health and wellbeing monitoring; multimodal sensors; Machine Learning; real-time traffic safety; cooperation of humans with robots

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: ACKNOWLEDGMENT: DistriMuSe is supported by the Chips Joint Undertaking and its members, including the top-up funding by National Authorities under Grant Agreement No 101139769. Funded by the European Union. Views and opinions expressed are however those of the author(s) only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union or the granting authority.
